summary: Kept #46797 as the live canonical issue and kept #83041 as the related open contributor PR that currently owns the focused fix path. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix-PR action is planned in this read-only plan job.

actions.reason: #46797 is still the clearest open report for the root cause and should remain the canonical tracking issue until a fix lands.

#83041 appears to be the focused contributor fix for #46797, but this plan job blocks merge/fix actions and the PR still has review/readiness concerns, so it should stay open as related candidate-fix work rather than be closed or merged by this cluster.
